# Site 99

> Site 99 is a creative agency built on narrative control. We build brand residencies, content systems, and campaigns for ambitious teams.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Site 99's manifesto — narrative control and creative residency.
- [Archive](/archive): Case studies and selected work — campaigns and content systems.
- [Residents](/residents): Brands currently in residency at Site 99.
- [Philosophy](/philosophy): The Site 99 doctrines on narrative, attention, and craft.
- [Access](/access): Apply for residency — tell us about your brand and brief.

## Field Notes

- [TikTok marketing strategy for Uganda](/blog/tiktok-viral-economics-uganda): The viral economics of 10M UGX — TikTok ROI vs TV in Uganda.
